prestazioni: Engine swap to 3S-GTE Gen 4 (from Toyota Caldina GT-Four) with forged internals: JE 87mm pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, ACL Race Series bearings, and a Tomei 264° camshaft for high-RPM power delivery. Pair with a Garrett GT3076R turbo (0.82 A/R turbine housing) and a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel intercooler piping system from HKS.

Full bolt-on fuel system upgrade: Walbro 450LPH in-tank fuel pump, ID1000x injectors, and a Tomei Type-S fuel pressure regulator. ECU reflash via Haltech Elite 2500 with custom 3S-GTE base maps optimized for 98 RON fuel and E85 flex-fuel capability.

Chassis reinforcement and drivetrain upgrades: Cusco 3-point strut tower bar, TRD 22mm rear sway bar, and a KAAZ 1.5-way limited-slip differential. Suspension overhaul with Tein Flex Z coilovers (custom valving for OPA chassis) and Energy Suspension polyurethane bushings for subframe and control arms.
estetica: Vertex Lang II widebody kit (OPA-specific fitment) with custom carbon fiber front splitter and rear diffuser from Seibon. Rear wing swap to a custom 1.5m APR Performance GTC-300 (adapted to OPA trunk with custom mounts).

Full OEM+ restomod: Toyota Racing Development (TRD) Sportivo grille (discontinued, OPA-specific), JDM OPA side markers with LED conversion, and custom rear bumper delete with integrated dual 3.5-inch exhaust outlets (custom fabrication by Autoexe).

Interior overhaul: Bride Zeta III bucket seats (OPA-specific mounting brackets), Nardi Classic 380mm steering wheel with TRD horn button, and custom rear seat delete with a full Cusco bolt-in roll cage (half-cage, OPA-specific design) and Alcantara door cards with red stitching.
